---
title: ""
pagetitle: "Fiesta - Home"
subtitle: ""
page-layout: custom
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

<div class="video-wrapper">
  <video autoplay loop muted playsinline>
    <source src="GIF4_locations.webm" type="video/webm">
    <source src="GIF4_locations.mp4" type="video/mp4">
  </video>
  <div class="hero-date">29 · 08 · 2026</div>
</div>

::: {.hero-content}

::: {.hero-text}
 We’re really looking forward to pop the bubbles, celebrating, and simply enjoying the evening with our favorite people.\
It would mean a lot to us if you joined us — raising a glass to love & friendship.
:::

::: {.hero-names}
with love J <img src="heart_dark_green.png" class="inline-heart"> S
:::

<div class="register-btn-wrapper">
<a href="RSVP/RSVP.html" class="register-btn">RSVP · ANMELDUNG</a>
</div>


<div class="secondary-btn-wrapper">
<a href="location/location.html" class="secondary-btn">Location</a>
<a href="FAQs/FAQs.html" class="secondary-btn">FAQs</a>
</div>

:::
